creative_direction.reasoning: The ad is a studio product-grid photograph with a serif editorial headline on top. The 6 products (scoop, drops, 3-pack sticks, shaker bottle, pouch, canister) must be photographed/rendered with consistent lighting, scale, and AG1's signature forest-green palette — image-gen must handle this as a cohesive composition. Track A is feasible for the visual, but headline + price labels need Track B compositing for accuracy.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Apothecary-style product grid with strikethrough-to-free pricing, serif editorial headline — reframes the $79 subscription as a $72 welcome kit gift.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Studio-lit product grid with typography baked in.

nano_banana_json.scene: Editorial studio product photograph on a warm cream background: six AG1 products arranged in a strict 3-column 2-row grid. Serif editorial black headline in the top 20% of canvas. Under each product, a small label shows the struck-through retail price followed by 'Free' (or '30 Day Supply of AG1' for the center hero).

subject.description: Six wellness products in AG1's signature dark forest green palette, shot flat-lay against cream.

products_top_row.item: a dark green measuring scoop with powder inside, slightly angled
products_top_row.label: Free

products_top_row.item: a small amber-brown glass dropper bottle with 'AG1' label (vitamin D drops)
products_top_row.label: $29 (struck through) Free

products_top_row.item: a rectangular stack of 3 AG1-branded daily stick packets in forest green, labeled 'AG1 / AG1 / AG1'
products_top_row.label: $15 (struck through) Free

products_bottom_row.item: a clear shaker bottle with black screw cap, filled with dark green liquid, 'AG1' in white text on the side
products_bottom_row.label: $14 (struck through) Free

products_bottom_row.item: a large forest-green stand-up pouch labeled 'AG1 NEXT GEN — Daily Foundational Nutrition' (hero of the grid)
products_bottom_row.label: 30 Day Supply of AG1

products_bottom_row.item: a tall forest-green tin canister with 'AG' embossed subtly
products_bottom_row.label: $14 (struck through) Free

camera.angle: top-down flat-lay (but each product shot from slight 20-30° front angle to show dimension)

lighting.key_light: soft large softbox from upper front
lighting.fill: bounce from front to kill under-shadow
lighting.shadows: very soft subtle shadow under each product, grounding only, 20% opacity

composition.grid: 3 columns × 2 rows, equal spacing, center bottom product slightly larger as hero

style_directives: editorial apothecary / wellness lookbook (reference: Aesop, Le Labo, Glossier)
all products rendered at normalized visual size (not actual relative scale)
consistent lighting direction across all products

text_elements_in_image.content:
Get Your $72 Free
Welcome Kit Now**
text_elements_in_image.font: Editorial serif (Canela / Tiempos / Söhne Breit — elegant high-contrast serif)
text_elements_in_image.notes: Serif is non-negotiable; sans breaks the luxury register

text_elements_in_image.treatment: below each product — struck-through previous price in smaller gray sans, then the word 'Free' in slightly larger black sans. Center hero says '30 Day Supply of AG1' in black sans.

text_elements_in_image.content: ** Offer Valid For New Subscribers Only

negative_prompt: no plastic-y photorealism — must look editorial-magazine grade

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate the 6-product studio grid on cream. Text (headline, labels, legal) composited in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Same 6-product AG1 grid composition as Track A — cream canvas, 3-column 2-row, editorial studio lighting — but WITH NO HEADLINE and NO PRICE LABELS. Only the product photography.

camera.angle: flat-lay with slight dimensional angle per product

lighting.style: soft large softbox, very subtle grounding shadows

reserved_text_zones.bbox_pct: one below each of the 6 products

elements.content:
Get Your $72 Free
Welcome Kit Now**

elements.style: strikethrough on '$29' in gray, 'Free' in black

elements.content: ** Offer Valid For New Subscribers Only

assets.name: AG1 product line (6 SKUs)
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Six AG1 products in signature dark forest-green (#1E3A34) branding: dark green measuring scoop, small amber glass dropper bottle with 'AG1' white label, stack of 3 forest-green daily stick packets with 'AG1' white text, clear shaker bottle with black cap and 'AG1' in white on side filled with dark green liquid, large forest-green stand-up pouch labeled 'AG1 NEXT GEN Daily Foundational Nutrition', tall forest-green tin canister with subtle embossed 'AG' lettering. All products consistent in lighting and shot style.
assets.fidelity_confidence: medium — product rendering is image-gen's strong suit but brand labels/text may need composite

prompt_writer_training_notes: Serif headline is load-bearing for luxury-DTC register — must name the typeface family (Canela/Tiempos) or request 'editorial high-contrast serif'. Do NOT say 'elegant font' (vague). Cream #EEEAE0 is warmer than pure white and warmer than off-white — exact hex matters. Product lighting spec should say 'apothecary / luxury wellness' — image gen recognizes these references. Strikethrough pricing is easier to composite than bake — Track B strongly preferred.
